---
title: "Quality_Report"
author: "GenDoc94"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document: default
  pdf_document: default
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(tidyverse)
library(knitr)
source("read_files.R")

#Creating bases
qualmet <- left_join(quality, metadata, by = c("samplename" = "Id"))
qualmet_clean <- qualmet |> select(samplename, quantity, mol_n_50, coverage, map_rate, fp_rate, fn_rate, Dx)
```

## Quality Report MM

```{r quality_MM, echo=TRUE}
qualmet_clean |> 
        arrange(quantity, coverage) |>
        filter(Dx == "MM") |>
        kable()
```

## Quality Report LMA

```{r quality_LMA, echo=TRUE}
qualmet_clean |> 
        arrange(quantity, coverage) |>
        filter(Dx == "LMA") |>
        kable()
```
